memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-06-02 — Market Close (Session Blackout Days 23-25)

**3 consecutive trading day blackout (May 30, June 1, June 2 daytime):** Zero routines fired. The API blockage is directly causing massive benchmark gap widening.

**MRVL Computex lesson:** Jensen Huang's Computex endorsement ('next trillion-dollar company') drove MRVL +30% on June 2. MRVL has been on our MANDATORY watchlist at score 7.5-8.0 since May 28. The API block prevented entry at $202.19 (May 29 limit). The Computex catalyst was unexpected — cannot be faulted for the miss. However, the AGGREGATE missed opportunity (AMD, MU, MRVL, PLTR all up strongly since May 6 when block started) is entirely attributable to the API blockage.

**BTC -6% June 2:** Bitcoin broke below $70K. Crypto market rotating into AI equities. No crypto entry warranted until BTC recovers above $82K threshold. ETH ~$1,921.

**Benchmark gap -5.70 pp:** The gap has now widened from -3.04 pp (May 20 baseline) to -5.70 pp. Every trading day of API blockage costs approximately 0.2-0.5 pp of benchmark performance.

**API fix is STILL the #1 priority.** Operator must either (a) add paper-api.alpaca.markets and data.alpaca.markets to the egress allowlist, or (b) manually execute the mandatory watchlist orders at https://app.alpaca.markets.
